title: Security Audit Assistant
description: Audit application security posture, auth, data exposure, dependencies, cloud risk, and compliance readiness.

fields.name: auth
fields.label: Auth and roles
fields.placeholder: OAuth, admin role, user role, API keys

fields.name: dataTypes
fields.label: Sensitive data
fields.placeholder: Customer PII, billing data, access logs

fields.name: exposure
fields.label: Public exposure
fields.placeholder: Public forms, API endpoints, admin dashboard

fields.name: dependencies
fields.label: Dependencies
fields.placeholder: Next.js, Prisma, Stripe, auth provider, background jobs

fields.name: knownRisks
fields.label: Known risks
fields.placeholder: Weak admin auth, missing rate limits, old dependencies

workflowSteps: Check auth, dependency, cloud, and compliance signals.

scoringRules.label: Auth and access
scoringRules.description: Roles, MFA, API keys, session risk.

sampleInput.auth: OAuth login, admin role, user role, service API keys, no enforced MFA yet
sampleInput.dataTypes: Customer PII, billing metadata, usage logs, integration tokens
sampleInput.exposure: Public marketing pages, authenticated dashboard, API endpoints, webhook receiver
sampleInput.dependencies: Next.js, Prisma, Stripe, auth provider, background jobs
sampleInput.knownRisks: Missing rate limits on some endpoints, old dependencies, weak admin review process
